2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="search_form__input" id="s" name="s" tabindex="-1" type="text" value=""/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.2 Navn, rolle, verdi (57 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

iframe is missing title attribute

<iframe aria-hidden="true" height="0" src="https://www.googletagmanager.com/ns.html?id=GTM-5K8S9ZJ" style="display:none;visibility:hidden" width="0"></iframe>
Add descriptive title attribute to iframe
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg role="img" viewbox="0 0 320 512" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path class="" d="M207.6 256l107.72-107.72c6.23-6.23 6.23-16.34 0-22.58l-25.03-25.03c-6.23-6.23-16.34-6.23-22.58 0L160 208.4 52
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Element with role='img' needs an accessible name

<svg height="15" role="img" viewbox="0 0 320 512" width="15" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path class="" d="M279.14 288l14.22-92.66h-88.91v-60.13c0-25.35 12.42-50.06 52.24-50.06h40.42V6.26S260.4
Add aria-label or aria-labelledby attribute
Testregel 4.1.2 (4.1.2 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Focusable element is inside aria-hidden container

MODERATE

<a> element has conflicting role='button'

Add text like '(opens in new tab)' or use visually-hidden text for screen readers
2.1.1 Tastatur (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.1.1 (2.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Interactive input has tabindex='-1' - not keyboard accessible

<input class="search_form__input" id="s" name="s" tabindex="-1" type="text" value=""/>
Remove tabindex='-1' unless element is in an inactive state
4.1.1 Parsing (1 avvik)
Testregel 4.1.1 (4.1.1 - Nivå A)
SERIOUS

Duplicate ID found: 'fakturainformasjon' appears 2 times

id="fakturainformasjon"
Each ID must be unique on the page

Heading level skipped: h1 to h3
